title: Verifier-backed four-case study for the H-series heuristic-first mainline

exclusions: No E5/E6/E7 artifact is read or used.
This is a verifier-backed case study, not an aggregate benchmark claim.

sources.path_provenance_rule: For every case, order_path, solution_path, and verify_path are copied from the E1 full-670 summary row. The split manifest is used only for split, eval_groups, and difficulty_bucket; its legacy solution_path is not used.

categories.selection_rule: One feasible case with the largest observed total_work_minutes and complexity_score among E1 feasible rows, and one feasible case with the largest observed task_count and solve_seconds among E1 feasible rows.
An order whose requested quantity is fully covered by inventory and whose E1 solution is an empty optimal plan verified as ok.
An E1 infeasible_proven row carrying a concrete machine-capacity lower-bound error; verifier status must remain not_applicable.

cases.selection: Hard test/OOD feasible case selected as the maximum observed total_work_minutes and complexity_score among E1 feasible rows.
evidence: The E1 summary row reports feasible and verify_status=ok with zero verify and machine errors.
The E1 solution reports 7,046 scheduled operations; the E1 summary row reports 6,947 tasks after merge.
The E1 full-670 feasible-row maximum check identifies this case for total_work_minutes and complexity_score.
cases.allowed_claim: This recorded E1 timed_greedy solution for this selected hard test/OOD order passed the recorded verifier with no reported errors.
claim_limits: Do not claim an optimal schedule.
Do not extrapolate this case result to all OOD orders or the full benchmark.
Use only with the cited E1 provenance and stated claim limits.

cases.selection: Hard train feasible case selected as the maximum observed task_count (9,129 after merge) and solve_seconds (15.010928976000287) among E1 feasible rows.
evidence: The E1 summary row reports feasible and verify_status=ok with zero verify and machine errors.
The E1 solution reports 9,280 scheduled operations; the E1 summary row reports 9,129 tasks after merge.
The E1 full-670 feasible-row maximum check identifies this case for task_count and solve_seconds.
cases.allowed_claim: This recorded E1 timed_greedy solution for this selected hard training order passed the recorded verifier with no reported errors.
claim_limits: Do not claim the solve time is a universal upper bound.
Do not compare this train case as an OOD generalization result.
Use only with the cited E1 provenance and stated claim limits.

cases.selection: Test case selected to document the inventory-deduction path: the order requests five units and records five in inventory, yielding an empty zero-task optimal plan.
evidence: The raw order records requested_quantity=5 and inventory_quantity=5 for product 6566092.
The E1 solution reports status=optimal, plan=[], and net_required_total=0; the E1 summary row reports task_count=0.
The E1 verifier reports status=ok, task_count=0, error_count=0, and machine_concurrency_checked=true.
cases.allowed_claim: For this recorded order, the E1 inventory deduction produced a zero-task empty plan that the recorded verifier accepted.
claim_limits: Do not claim inventory semantics were independently revalidated beyond the cited order, solution, and verifier artifacts.
Do not use this case to claim performance on non-zero-work orders.
Use only with the cited E1 provenance and stated claim limits.

cases.selection: Hard test/OOD case selected because E1 records an infeasible_proven machine-capacity lower-bound error for CMM CONTURA 10/16/6.
evidence: The E1 summary row reports status=infeasible_proven and verify_status=not_applicable.
The E1 solution error states: 设备 CMM CONTURA 10/16/6 总工时超过可用容量：10701.610000 > 10080.000000.
No schedule is emitted for this lower-bound infeasibility path; verifier status is intentionally and correctly not_applicable.
cases.allowed_claim: For this recorded order, the E1 artifact reports a CMM capacity lower-bound infeasibility of 10701.610000 > 10080.000000; schedule verification is not applicable because no schedule was produced.
claim_limits: Do not describe not_applicable as verifier success or failure.
Do not claim this one lower-bound certificate characterizes all infeasible orders.
Use only with the cited E1 provenance and stated claim limits.

required_checks: Every order, solution, and verify path exists and belongs to the cited E1 full-670 run.
Every summary_row_source case matches status, verifier status, solver, strategy, and observed metrics.
The zero-task case has requested quantity and inventory quantity both equal to five, E1 plan=[], and verifier status=ok.
The infeasible case retains verify_status=not_applicable and the exact CMM comparison 10701.610000 > 10080.000000.
The draft keeps all allowed-claim and claim-limit boundaries.
